requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General)
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity.
summary.zh: 在欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。
summary.zht: 在歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters must obtain fresh EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing from an EU-recognised laboratory (or ILAC MRA-member lab accepted under NB scope). Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not substitute. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD (manufacturer self-declaration with Technical File is the standard route), but the harmonised standard testing must cover EU-specific deviations (e.g., connector interoperability, specific earthing arrangements). Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and EU-language technical instructions are all required.
gap.zh: 出口商须重新通过欧盟认可实验室（或在公告机构范围内被接受的ILAC MRA成员实验室）完成EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测，现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不可替代。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构（制造商自我声明+技术文件为标准路径），但协调标准检测须涵盖欧盟特定偏差（如连接器互操作性、特定接地方式）。文件差距：需提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及欧盟语言技术说明书。
gap.zht: 出口商須重新通過歐盟認可實驗室（或在公告機構範圍內被接受的ILAC MRA成員實驗室）完成EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測，現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不可替代。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構（製造商自我聲明+技術文件為標準路徑），但協調標準檢測須涵蓋歐盟特定偏差（如連接器互操作性、特定接地方式）。文件差距：需提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及歐盟語言技術說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required before EU market placement under Directive 2014/35/EU
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is the harmonised standard granting presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway; independent re-testing to EN IEC 61851-1 is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据LVD 2014/35/EU，CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019为适用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求的协调标准，符合该标准可推定符合指令。中国GB/T 18487.1认证不满足欧盟合格评定路径；须独立重新完成EN IEC 61851-1检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據LVD 2014/35/EU，CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019為適用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求的協調標準，符合該標準可推定符合指令。中國GB/T 18487.1認證不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑；須獨立重新完成EN IEC 61851-1檢測。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) must comply with EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station), the current edition harmonised under LVD 2014/35/EU, which supersedes the 2014 edition. Key requirements include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. The standard applies to stationary and non-stationary DC EV charging stations supplying DC current to EVs at voltages above ELV.
summary.zh: 直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）须符合EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站），该版本为现行版本，已取代2014年版并在LVD 2014/35/EU下协调。核心要求包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。该标准适用于向电动汽车提供超特低压直流电的固定及非固定式直流充电站。
summary.zht: 直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）須符合EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站），該版本為現行版本，已取代2014年版並在LVD 2014/35/EU下協調。核心要求包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通信協議。該標準適用於向電動汽車提供超特低壓直流電的固定及非固定式直流充電站。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)

summary.en: [UNVERIFIED] China uses GB/T 18487.3-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — DC charging station) as the domestic equivalent for DC charging stations, technically derived from IEC 61851-23 but with national deviations including CCS2/GB-specific connector requirements (GB/T 20234.3). Domestic CQC or CNAS certification to GB/T 18487.3 is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 【未经核实】中国以GB/T 18487.3-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——直流充电站）作为国内直流充电站的对应标准，技术上源自IEC 61851-23，但含有国家偏差，包括CCS2/GB专用连接器要求（GB/T 20234.3）。国内依据GB/T 18487.3获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 【未經核實】中國以GB/T 18487.3-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——直流充電站）作為國內直流充電站的對應標準，技術上源自IEC 61851-23，但含有國家偏差，包括CCS2/GB專用連接器要求（GB/T 20234.3）。國內依據GB/T 18487.3獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — DC charging station [UNVERIFIED]
GB/T 20234.3-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler [UNVERIFIED]

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to the EU must be re-tested to EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (the current edition, which supersedes the 2014 edition) with particular attention to: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European grid topology; (3) CHAdeMO or CCS2 communication protocol compliance. The connector type itself is a hardware gap — Chinese DC stations typically use GB/T 20234.3 plugs, which are not CCS2 or CHAdeMO compatible without hardware redesign.
gap.zh: 出口欧盟的直流充电站须重新通过EN IEC 61851-23:2023（现行版本，已取代2014年版）检测，重点关注：（1）CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异；（2）欧洲电网拓扑下的绝缘监控要求；（3）CHAdeMO或CCS2通信协议合规性。连接器本身构成硬件差距——中国直流充电站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插头，在未经硬件重新设计的情况下与CCS2或CHAdeMO不兼容。
gap.zht: 出口歐盟的直流充電站須重新通過EN IEC 61851-23:2023（現行版本，已取代2014年版）檢測，重點關注：（1）CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異；（2）歐洲電網拓撲下的絕緣監控要求；（3）CHAdeMO或CCS2通信協議合規性。連接器本身構成硬體差距——中國直流充電站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插頭，在未經硬體重新設計的情況下與CCS2或CHAdeMO不相容。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU; EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is the current harmonised standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.3 under SAMR/SAC framework [UNVERIFIED on current enforcement detail]

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under LVD with EN IEC 61851-23:2023 as the applicable current harmonised standard (the 2014 edition is superseded). Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted. A significant hardware gap exists: Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU CCS2 standard — hardware redesign is typically needed before EU market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】直流充电站须依据LVD取得CE标志，适用协调标准为EN IEC 61851-23:2023（现行版本，2014年版已被取代）。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不被接受。存在重大硬件差距：中国直流充电站使用与欧盟CCS2标准不兼容的GB/T连接器，进入欧盟市场通常需要硬件重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】直流充電站須依據LVD取得CE標誌，適用協調標準為EN IEC 61851-23:2023（現行版本，2014年版已被取代）。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不被接受。存在重大硬體差距：中國直流充電站使用與歐盟CCS2標準不相容的GB/T連接器，進入歐盟市場通常需要硬體重新設計。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722)
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）

summary.en: IEC 60364-7-722 (Low-voltage electrical installations — Requirements for special installations — Supply of electric vehicles) specifies installation requirements for circuits supplying EV charging points in buildings, covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. In EU member states, this IEC standard is typically adopted as national installation standard (e.g., HD 60364-7-722 in harmonised form). It applies to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself, but exported EV chargers must be compatible with these installation requirements.
summary.zh: IEC 60364-7-722（低压电气装置——特殊装置要求——电动汽车供电）规定了建筑内电动汽车充电点供电回路的安装要求，涵盖保护措施（B型或A型+直流检测RCD）、布线、接地及负荷管理。在欧盟成员国，该IEC标准通常以国家安装标准形式采用（如协调版HD 60364-7-722）。该标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身，但出口欧盟的充电设备须与上述安装要求兼容。
summary.zht: IEC 60364-7-722（低壓電氣裝置——特殊裝置要求——電動汽車供電）規定了建築內電動汽車充電點供電迴路的安裝要求，涵蓋保護措施（B型或A型+直流檢測RCD）、布線、接地及負荷管理。在歐盟成員國，該IEC標準通常以國家安裝標準形式採用（如協調版HD 60364-7-722）。該標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身，但出口歐盟的充電設備須與上述安裝要求相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by EU member states) [UNVERIFIED on current adopted version per member state]

summary.en: [UNVERIFIED] China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with EU member-state installation standards.
summary.zh: 【未经核实】中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合欧盟成员国安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 【未經核實】中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合歐盟成員國安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) [UNVERIFIED]
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure [UNVERIFIED]

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 is an installation standard — it governs the fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers must declare compatibility with Type B RCDs (or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs) per EU installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under EU member-state electrical codes will fail field acceptance. Chinese charger datasheets often omit IEC 60364-7-722 compatibility declarations required by EU installers and grid operators.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口欧盟的充电设备须依据欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容（或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD）。若充电设备要求的安装条件在欧盟成员国电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含欧盟安装商及电网运营商所要求的IEC 60364-7-722兼容性声明。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口歐盟的充電設備須依據歐盟安裝實踐聲明與B型RCD相容（或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD），若充電設備要求的安裝條件在歐盟成員國電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含歐盟安裝商及電網運營商所要求的IEC 60364-7-722相容性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at installation level in EU member states (adopted as national standard); charger product compatibility is a practical market requirement enforced by grid operators and installers
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD [UNVERIFIED on current enforcement detail]

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364-7-722 governs building-side installation in EU member states. EV chargers exported to the EU must be compatible with its RCD and earthing requirements. This is distinct from the product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compliance in practice blocks field installation. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Exporters should include IEC 60364-7-722 compatibility statements in product technical documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】IEC 60364-7-722规范欧盟成员国的建筑侧安装。出口欧盟的充电设备须与其RCD及接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志有所区别，但实践中不合规将阻碍现场安装。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。出口商应在产品技术文件中包含IEC 60364-7-722兼容性声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】IEC 60364-7-722規範歐盟成員國的建築側安裝。出口歐盟的充電設備須與其RCD及接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌有所區別，但實踐中不合規將阻礙現場安裝。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。出口商應在產品技術文件中包含IEC 60364-7-722相容性聲明。
